Murrah.suitable_food: Green fodder, dry fodder, oil cakes, concentrates
Murrah.traits: Jet black coat, tightly curled horns, high milk fat content (7-8%)

Jaffarabadi.suitable_food: Green fodder, maize silage, cotton seed cake
Jaffarabadi.traits: Heavy buffalo, drooping horns, docile temperament

Mehsana.suitable_food: Green fodder, cotton seed cake, dry fodder
Mehsana.traits: Cross of Murrah and Surti, long body, sickle-shaped horns

Surti.traits: Medium size, sickle-shaped horns, good draught power

Banni.suitable_food: Arid fodder grasses, local shrubs, oil cakes
Banni.traits: Adapted to harsh desert climate, high disease resistance

Gir.suitable_food: Dry fodder, cotton seeds, maize fodder
Gir.traits: Dome-shaped forehead, long drooping ears, docile temperament

Sahiwal.suitable_food: Green fodder, wheat straw, mustard oil cake
Sahiwal.traits: Reddish brown coat, loose skin, heat tolerant

Tharparkar.traits: Grey coat, hardy, heat tolerant, good draught power

Red Sindhi.suitable_food: Green fodder, dry straw, cotton seed cake
Red Sindhi.traits: Reddish-brown coat, compact body, popular for crossbreeding

Ongole.suitable_food: Groundnut cake, green fodder, maize stalks
Ongole.traits: Large white cattle, strong build, exported for beef & draught

Deoni.suitable_food: Mixed fodder crops, sorghum, cotton seed cake
Deoni.traits: Dual-purpose (milk & draught), white with black spots
